title: Sonic The Hedgehog Sonic 3 Movie Super Shadow Action Figure by Jakks Pacific, Stands 5” / 13 cm Tall, Highly Articulated for Boys/Girls, Officially Licensed 3 Movie, Suggested for Ages 3+
features: Highly Articulated Collectable: This Super Shadow 13 cm action figure, recreate your favorite scenes from Sonic the Hedgehog 3. A must-have for any Sonic the Hedgehog toys collection!
Officially Licensed Sonic Toy: This officially licensed Jakks Pacific Sonic toy is perfect for fans of Sonic 3 movie figures. Add this gem to your Sonic movie 3 toys shadow collection today!
Recreate the Sonic Movie 3: Bring the excitement of the Sonic movie 3 home with this Sonic the Hedgehog toy! This Super Shadow action figure is a standout among the Sonic the Hedgehog figures.
Perfect for Sonic 3 Fans: Whether you're a seasoned collector or new to the world of Sonic 3 toys, this action figure is a perfect choice. Dive into Sonic Jakks Pacific collectables!
Quality Hedgehog Toy: This highly detailed Super Shadow figure is a premier choice for those seeking Sonic the Hedgehog figures for recreating your favorite Sonic 3 movie moments!
